# SecTransformInstanceBlock

**Type Alias**

A block that you return from a transform creation function.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias SecTransformInstanceBlock = () -> Unmanaged<CFError>?
```

## Return Value

A an error object if an error occurred.

## Discussion

You return a block of this type from the custom transform creation function of type [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformCreateFP] that you register with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformRegister(_:_:_:)] function.
